a little something
💌

Someone made this
just for you, Mast Billo

a few taps, a few surprises… ready?

Hold the heart...
Tap to light up these 18 stars, representing 18 beautiful chapters of your life. (0/18)
Just as you lit up these stars, you've lit up my entire world.
Tap to open the envelope...

18 Times You Melted My Heart

Tap the envelopes to open them...

💗
Tap to collect
✦ scratch to reveal ✦
01

Messy shirts, beautiful memories.

The absolute best part of my school days was sharing these smiles with my Cutie. ✨

✦ scratch to reveal ✦
02

That green saree on you! 💚

A perfect mirror selfie with my gorgeous Rasmalai.

✦ scratch to reveal ✦
03

Under the magical lights

but honestly, your sweet smile was still the brightest thing there. 💫

✦ scratch to reveal ✦
04

Farewell diaries! 🖤

Look at us... though I was definitely just lucky to be standing next to the prettiest girl in the room.

✦ scratch to reveal ✦
05

Those squishy cheeks! 🥰

I promise to always annoy you, pull your cheeks, and make you smile exactly like this.

FORGET THE ORIGINALS

Nothing sounds as beautiful as you.

♥

Tap the heart for your next gift ✨

I have a lot
of names for you...

Find your name pair of two and unlock your next gift.

just for you

Flowers fade, but this one is coded to last forever.

Everything about you

tap each one 💗

🌸
Your Heart
tap
So pure, completely mine. ✨
💭
Your Mind
tap
Always your safe place. 🤍
💔
Our Fights
tap
Always ends in love. 🫂
💕
Just You
tap
You are my world. 💖
♡
♡
✦

July 17th

Happy 18th Birthday my Cutie! 💗😻

Sabse pehle to I am so so so sorry yaarrr... Mujhe pata h kal raat ko jab tumne mujhse ek lamba paragraph likhne ko bola tha... to maine bohot ajeeb tarah se mana kr diya tha! I know it sounded very rude... aur tumko zaroor bura laga hoga but Please uske liye mujhe maaf kr do! 🫶🏻 I genuinely didn't mean to hurt your feelings... Sach batau to mai wo paragraph isliye nhi likhna chahta tha kyuki mai bohot time se tumhare liye ye puri website design kr rha tha... mai tumko sirf ek normal text bhej kr wish nhi krna chahta tha! Mujhe tumhe ek aisa surprise dena tha jo humesha ke liye special ban jaye bilkul tumhari tarah jitni tum special ho... ❤️👀🥰

Upar se mera PC ka data pura wipe out ho gaya tha you know that... to sab kuch wapas se build krne me thoda delay ho gya... mujhe ye surprise exact midnight par dena tha... par is delay ke liye I am extremely sorry! ❤️🩹 mai bas chahta tha ki mai tumko dikha sakun ki tum mere liye kitna matter krti ho... 😘🫶🏻

〰️

Tumko shayad andaza bhi nhi h ki tum kitni special ho! 💗 Meri nazaron me you are absolutely perfect... aur tumhare andar mujhe aaj tak koi flaw nhi dikha! 😻 Tum literally sabse pyaari aur cutest insaan ho jisse mai aaj tak mila hu... par ek baat bolu? mujhe pata h tum bohot zyada overthink krti ho... Please... mere liye ye overthinking krna thoda kam kr do I mean band hi krdo! aur haan... baat baat per roona to aaj se bilkul hi band kr do! Agar mai tumhare liye thoda sa bhi matter krta hu na... to please rona mat... ❤️🩹 Tumhara vo soft heart bohot precious h... aur tumhari aankhon me aansu bilkul acche nhi lagte! tumhari wo choti choti baaton pe sensitive ho jana cute lagta h... par mujhe tumhe khush dekhna h... humesha... 🥰😘

Koi bhi tumhari jagah kabhi nhi le sakta... aur koi tumhe replace nhi kr skta! ❤️ tumne mujhe jis tarah se special feel krwaya h vo mai kabhi bhul nhi sakta... Wo first time jab tumne mera haath pakda tha... us ek moment ne mujhe itna special feel krwaya tha ki mai usko words mein describe hi nhi kr sakta! 😻🫶🏻 Par mujhe pata h ki tum exactly samajh rhi ho mai kya kehna chahta hu... tum sach mein meri Rasmalai... meri Sweetheart... meri Jaan... aur meri sabse badi Cutie ho... 😘💗🥰

❤

Aaj tumhara 18th birthday h officially a grown up now! 🎉 Ye milestone bohot bada h... aur mai wish krta hu ki tumhari life ka ye naya chapter bohot saari khushiyan... success... aur pyaar lekar aaye mera wala ofc 👀❤️ Bhagwan kare tumhe duniya ki har wo chiz mile jo tumhara dil chahta h! mai chahta hoon ki life ke is naye phase mein tum aur bhi zyada strong bano... aur apni us beautiful smile ko kabhi fade mat hone dena! 🥰 Zindagi chahe kitni bhi aage badh jaye... mujhe tumhara pura saath chahiye... Mai chahta hoon ki tum meri is journey mein humesha mere saath raho... aur mai bhi promise krta hu ki chahe kuch bhi ho jaye... mai tumhare saath khada rahunga! 🫶🏻❤️🩹

You are irreplaceable! 😻 Once again... sorry for being a little late aur kal raat wese behave krne ke liye... I just wanted this to be absolutely perfect for you! 😘

I love you so much baby! Happy 18th Birthday! 💗🥰❤️🫶🏻

♡
18
Tap to open, I have something for you...
🐰

One last promise... From today onwards, no more crying. I mean it, no getting upset over silly little things. And absolutely no more overthinking too! Deal?

Yes, that's my girl! 💖

Now keep that promise for forever.

Love you so much... And sorry again! ✨
